privileged_info_summary: The task is a refactoring exercise on a synthetic ecommerce-pricing Maven project. The initial PricingCalculator.java class contains three hardcoded values that must be extracted: tax rate 1.0825 should become constant TAX_MULTIPLIER, shipping cost 15.00 should become constant SHIPPING_COST, and magic string 'PLATINUM' should be extracted as a new method parameter named targetTier. The CheckoutService.java caller must be updated to pass the new argument. The task expects method signature calculateFinalPrice(double basePrice, String customerType, String targetTier) with compilation success.
